description_long: This is a single-story house with a prominent gable roof and a large, wraparound wooden porch bordered by white railings. The front facade features a dramatic, full-height glass window section with multiple panes, allowing ample natural light into the main living area. The house is surrounded by a white picket fence enclosing a rectangular grassy yard, and the porch includes outdoor seating and steps leading to the main entry. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, contrasting with the dark gray roof and white trim. The roof has a small cupola at its peak, adding a decorative touch. The overall design is open and inviting, with a focus on outdoor living and curb appeal.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof, large glass front windows, and a wraparound porch with white railings, set within a fenced grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass window section, main entry steps, and expansive porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the porch, outdoor seating area, and the main entry steps.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch area and the simple, windowless rear wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the porch and the roof's cupola.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows on front, minimal windows on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a set of steps leading to a covered porch with white railings and a prominent glass door, framed by large windows.
